title: TETROSYL LTD Carlube Xmg070 Lithium Multi-Purpose Grease
features: EXCELLENT LOW-TEMPERATURE FLUIDITY: Ensures smooth operation and effective lubrication even in cold conditions, preventing gear and bearing issues in low temperatures.
SUPERIOR ANTI-WEAR PROTECTION: Provides excellent protection against wear and tear, extending the life of mechanical components and reducing maintenance needs.
HIGH TEMPERATURE PERFORMANCE: Maintains stable performance and lubrication at high temperatures, ensuring reliable operation in demanding environments.
OUTSTANDING CORROSION PROTECTION: Shields against rust and corrosion, extending the lifespan of equipment and reducing the risk of damage from environmental factors.
VERSATILE NON-EP FORMULA: Ideal for various applications, Carlube LM2 Lithium Grease offers high-quality lubrication with excellent resistance to water washout and mechanical stress.
